full_text:
Ma Jun (Deheng) 馬鈞 (德衡)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Jun (馬鈞), styledDeheng (德衡), was born in FúFēng, present day vicinity of Qian county in Linyou of Shaanxi Province. Master of Works for Cao Rui. Advised the Emperor to drink Celestial Elixir. Ma Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
